# kSecAttrIsInvisible

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that’s a Boolean indicating the item’s visibility.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrIsInvisible: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean] and is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue] if the item is invisible (that is, should not be displayed).
title: kSecAttrIsInvisible
